name: M.WindowedVisitAssignment
label: Windowed Visit Assignment
description: Assign each observation to a scheduled analysis visit using day-windows and a target-day tie-break. SAP-style AVISIT derivation. Consumes a pre-computed study day (SDTM --DY) relative to the randomization anchor; no date subtraction inside the method.

formula.default_expression: analysisVisit := window.label WHERE day ∈ [window.dayMin, window.dayMax], tie-break closest(|day-targetDay|) then min(visitNumber)

configurations.name: referenceBC
configurations.description: Identifier of the BC that provides the randomization anchor (e.g. BiomedicalConcept_216 'Subject is Randomized'). Documents the SAP's day-zero; not consumed at runtime because --DY is already relative to this anchor.

configurations.name: windows
configurations.description: Scheduled visit windows: array of { label, visitNumber, dayMin, dayMax, targetDay }. dayMin/dayMax=null means unbounded.

configurations.name: tieBreak
configurations.description: Tie-break rule when multiple windows match the day.

methodInput.name: day
methodInput.description: Pre-computed study day (SDTM --DY column) relative to the randomization anchor. Positive = after anchor, zero/negative = at/before anchor.

methodInput.name: partition
methodInput.description: Subject-level partitioning. Not used by the default template (assignment is row-wise on day).
